value.body:
## Cleanup candidate

Running `pnpm exec tsc -p packages/desktop/tsconfig.json --noEmit --noUnusedLocals --noUnusedParameters` from `packages/desktop` reports unused parameters in shared packages pulled into the desktop typecheck.

## Evidence

- `packages/api/src/http/handlers/v1/agentTasks.ts:88` - `taskResponse(request, status, operation)` never reads `request`.
- `packages/database/src/services/DatabaseService.ts:3252` - `applyDatabaseEvent(..., aggregateType, ...)` never reads `aggregateType`.
- `packages/git-db/src/store/Store.ts:1666` - `objectIdAtSnapshotPath(store, adapter, snapshot, path)` never reads `store`.
- `packages/git-db/src/store/Store.ts:1829` - `listStoreEntriesAtSnapshot(store, runtime, snapshotId, normalizedPath)` never reads `store`.

## Suggested approach

Remove the unused parameters where callers can be updated cleanly, or intentionally prefix/reshape the API if the parameter is reserved for future behavior. Re-run the strict no-unused check afterward.

## Acceptance criteria

- The four unused parameter diagnostics are gone.
- Existing package typechecks still pass.
- Any retained intentionally-unused parameter has a clear reason in the signature or nearby code.

frontmatter.title: Remove unused parameters surfaced by TypeScript noUnused checks

value.title: Remove unused parameters surfaced by TypeScript noUnused checks
